craigslist.title: Sale or leasing to buy Single family house
craigslist.full_address: Coral Springs Drive, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Gorgeous 4-Bedroom, 2.5-Bath Home in Wesley Chapel This beautiful 3,075 sq. ft. single-family home features 4 spacious bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and a large covered and screened porch, offering the perfect combination of comfort, privacy, and convenience. The home features a spacious family room, a separate living room, a large kitchen with a breakfast area, and a formal dining room. Beautiful ceramic tile flooring runs throughout the home, and all rooms have been freshly painted. Large sliding glass doors open to the oversized screened porch, creating the perfect space for relaxing, entertaining, and enjoying Florida's outdoor lifestyle year-round. Located in a quiet and well-established neighborhood, this home offers a fantastic location with convenient access to shopping, dining, schools, medical facilities, and everyday amenities. This property is situated in a peaceful and desirable community while remaining close to major highways, including Interstate 275, making commuting easy and convenient. Rental Information Rent: $2,950 per month Sale Information Sale Price: $675,000 Don't miss this opportunity to own or rent a beautiful home in one of Wesley Chapel's most desirable locations. Rent-to-Own Opportunity This property is also available through a rent-to-own (lease-purchase) program. Rent-to-own provides an alternative path to homeownership for individuals who need additional time to improve their credit, save for a down payment, or qualify for traditional mortgage financing. Under a rent-to-own agreement: The tenant and owner enter into a lease-purchase contract. The lease term may range from one to five years. During the lease period, the tenant has the option to purchase the property. The purchase price is locked in at $675,000 and will not change during the lease term, regardless of future market value increases. The tenant pays an upfront option fee, typically between 6% and 10% of the purchase price, which may be credited toward the purchase if the option is exercised. Monthly rent is $2,950. Additional Financing Option The owner may consider providing seller financing of up to 60% for qualified buyers. Considering today's higher mortgage interest rates, rent-to-own can be an attractive option for buyers who wish to secure a home now while preparing for future financing opportunities. Don't miss this opportunity to own or rent this beautiful 4-bedroom home in one of Wesley Chapel's most desirable locations. Call or text: show contact info
